gate.unsupportedBody: This app runs the model on your device via WebGPU. Please use desktop Chrome, Edge, or a recent Safari.
gate.reasonNoWebgpu: Your browser does not support WebGPU.
gate.reasonNoAdapter: No compatible GPU adapter was found.
gate.reasonDeviceInitFailed: The GPU device could not be initialized.
gate.reasonOom: Your device ran out of memory initializing the GPU.
gate.guestConfirmed: You’re browsing as a guest. History and feedback still work without WebGPU.
gate.sampleSeeded: Sample code is ready in the editor.

preflight.fail: Your browser ({{browser}}) does not support the required capabilities.

download.title: Downloading Qwen2.5-Coder-1.5B (~1 GB, one time)
download.cdnError: Couldn’t reach the model host. Check your connection and retry.
download.quotaError: Not enough storage. Free up disk space or clear site data, then retry.
download.otherError: The model couldn’t be loaded. Please retry.
download.worksOffline: After the one-time download, it works offline.
download.readyDesc: Runs AI code review locally in your browser — nothing to install.

history.title: History
history.empty: No reviews yet. Run your first review to see it here.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.tooLarge: That code is too large to review.
errors.rateLimited: Too many requests. Please wait a moment and retry.
errors.saveFailed: Couldn’t save — your review is still here. Retry?
errors.deviceLost: The GPU connection was lost. Reconnecting…
errors.notFound: That review is no longer available.
errors.authStateMismatch: Sign-in couldn’t be verified. Please try again.
errors.authGithubError: GitHub sign-in failed. Please try again.
errors.authDbError: We couldn’t complete sign-in. Please try again.

auth.signInTooltip: Sign in to keep your reviews and resume them on any device.

feedback.saveToEnable: Save the review to leave feedback.

disclaimer.aiGenerated: Verify suggestions before relying on them.
disclaimer.onDevice: Inference never leaves your machine. Review history and anonymous usage metrics are sent to our server.
disclaimer.licenses: Qwen2.5-Coder-1.5B-Instruct (Apache-2.0), packaged for in-browser inference by the MLC team.

t1.title: Citations are clickable.
t1.desc: When the review cites line 5, click it — the editor jumps to and highlights that line.

t2.title: Run from the keyboard.
t2.desc: Press ⌘+Enter (Ctrl+Enter on Windows) in the editor to start a review.

t3.title: Bilingual reviews.
t3.desc: Switch the UI language and reviews follow — English or Japanese output, your choice.

t4.title: Sample code is a deck.
t4.desc: Every click deals a different buggy snippet — 10 languages in the rotation.

t5.title: Your reviews are saved.
t5.desc: Reopen past reviews from the sidebar; sign in with GitHub to sync across devices.

t6.title: Big files? No problem.
t6.desc: Oversized code is split and reviewed section by section, automatically.

language.label: Language
language.tooltip: Reviews follow the UI language — English or Japanese.

settings.title: Settings
settings.languageHint: Interface language. Reviews follow the model's language.
settings.telemetryHint: Send anonymous, code-free usage metrics to improve the demo.
